summary: Iteration 5: Tested audio/net/em-dash features for REEFSIDE. All em-dash replacements verified via DOM inspection. Fishing net enemy visually confirmed in SHIPWRECK level. Net code (entangle/stomp) verified in source. Audio functions wired correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ENTANGLED! and NET CLEARED! popups are canvas-rendered only - cannot be tested via DOM. Functionally verified in code (GameCanvas.jsx lines 534, 541). No action needed.
Audio SFX (playHit, playBubble, playNetEntangle) cannot be verified in headless browser as audio is off by default. Functions are imported and wired in GameCanvas.jsx correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features passed. Navigation to SHIPWRECK: hold ArrowRight 2.2s from hub start to reach navigator, press E, click SHIPWRECK, confirm, then hold right 2.8s to reach water hatch and press E to dive. Nets appear at y~200-300 screen area. Hub interaction zones: closet(x=160), tutorial(x=380), robot/navigator(x=620), catalog(x=860), hatch(x=1070).
